failure_reason: Added a source-classified side-effect ledger instead of adding more side effects. The ledger separates primary mutation, Python parity effects, reversible gate receipts, missing Python parity, and not-carried effects; it names rollback receipts as gate safety rather than domain parity, marks idea valuation audit-ledger writes as a blocker before ordinary no-header traffic can move, and passed local PR guard against the stacked base.
